calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-11-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerks: J. Rios Merida/K. Tom; Not Reported. (D611, Chambers)

Appearances:
Attorneys, Laura Flynn and Mark Hooshmand of the law offices of Hooshmand Law Group (415-318-5709) appear as counsels for plaintiff, Melanie Matheu

Plaintiff Melanie Matheu is present.

Attorney, Vicky W. Chan of the law offices of Demler, Armstrong & Rowland LLP (415-949-1900) appears as counsel for defendant, Alex Chan

Attorney Richard Reynolds of the law offices of Bennett Samuelsen Reynolds Allard et al (510-444-7688) appears as counsel for Defendant Alex Chan

Defendant Alex Chan is present.

Attorneys, Dean A. Pappas and Kenneth Wong of the law offices of Ropers Majeski Kohn Bentley (650-364-8200) appear as counsels for Safeco, insurance carrier for defendant, Alex Chan

Attorney Diane E. Pritchard of the law offices of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP (415-398-0200) appears as consel for USLI, insurance carrier for defendant Alex Chan

Judge Massullo, litigants and counsel confer in chambers, jointly and separately regarding settlement. The action settles in its entirety. The parties sign, but do not file a 13-page written agreement. Trial date may go off calendar and the matter shall be set for hearing on OSC Re Dismissal, six weeks out in Dept. 610.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2018 Set For Trial On Nov-13-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
